headline: Corpay (CPAY) Valuation Check As Recent Share Price Moves Put Focus Back On Payments Growth
summary: Corpay (CPAY) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$317.53. That puts fresh attention on its payments-focused business model and current valuation metrics. See our latest analysis for Corpay. Recent trading has been softer, with a 1 month share price return of 5.81% and a year to date share price return of 5.64%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is 8.57% and the 3 year total shareholder return is 59.50%. This points to stronger...
